ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of last activity */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., digital, physical) */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of resource (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the resource (e.g., PDF, JPEG, MP4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_key" TEXT /* Unique key or identifier for the resource */,
  "linked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is linked to other resources */,
  "unreleased" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is unreleased */,
  "expired" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is expired */,
  "badge" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource has a badge */,
  "evaluated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource has been evaluated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the resource is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the resource (if applicable) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the resource (if applicable) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility status of the resource (e.g., public, private) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or copyright information of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the resource */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership started */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ends (if applicable) */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_owners_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "linked_resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the linked resource */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., related, parent) */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_links_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_links_linked_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("linked_resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who evaluated the resource */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score given to the resource */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_evaluations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the badge (e.g., certification, achievement) */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
